8c13c867e1.text: „Charkiw hat seine Spuren auch im Werk Wassili Grossmans hinterlassen, der seinen Roman Alles fließt über die Zwangskollektivierung und den Holodomor ohne seine Studienzeit in Charkiw vermutlich nicht hätte schreiben können. Für Deutsche besonders wichtig ist Lew Kopelew: Der 1912 in Kiew geborene und 1997 in Deutschland gestorbene russisch-ukrainisch-jüdische Schriftsteller hat in Charkiw seine Jugendjahre verbracht.“
8c13c867e1.translation: Kharkiv has also left its marks on the work of Vasily Grossman, who probably could not have written his novel *All Flows* about the forced collectivization and the Holodomor without his studies in Kharkiv. Especially important for Germans is Lew Kopelew: The Russian-Ukrainian-Jewish writer, born in Kyiv in 1912 and died in Germany in 1997, spent his youth in Kharkiv.

8c64f0ccbf.translation: The non-white population of the Cape Colony had a lot to lose and actually lost a lot wherever the invading Boers gained control of an area. Their freedom, their livelihood, their right to physical integrity, to name just the basic things.

8ced6cbf9a.translation: Could it be that the self-healing powers of our body can no longer keep up because we overreach through our lifestyle, through what we do, and through what we disregard?

8cef202adb.translation: Slender young men of South Seas build dragged suitcases, boxes, baskets for the baggage belt, flowers, dolls, and occasionally even a stuffed crocodile to the cabin.

8cf340bc90.translation: The main food at W:O:A comes from the grill. It smokes all day on the campground [...]. But be careful when lighting it with spiritus - unfortunately, accidents also happen again and again.

8cf3654ac9.text: „Bernstein unterscheidet einen restringierten (= eingeschränkten) Kode und einen elaborierten oder differenzierten (= ›verfeinerten‹) Kode.“
8cf3654ac9.translation: Bernstein distinguishes between a restricted (= limited) code and an elaborated or differentiated (= refined) code.

8cf489b70b.translation: He has a lot of meat on his thighs; he should go on a fast.

8cf7549bdc.text: Der Ring der ganzen Zahlen bedeutet, dass sie unter anderem bezüglich der Addition einen Ring bilden.
8cf7549bdc.translation: The ring of whole numbers means that they form a ring with respect to addition, among other things.

8cf7942a08.text: „Ihre Suite bestand aus einem Salon und einem Schlafzimmer.“
8cf7942a08.translation: Her suite consisted of a living room and a bedroom.

8cf7c0bbd8.translation: It was the model of a magnificent yacht, and the son proudly wore the huge remote control with two antennas on a strap around his neck.

8cf7c585fb.text: „Aber sie fürchten ihn auch, denn Tabaqui wird leicht von Tollwut befallen, viel leichter als irgendein anderes Tier in der Dschungel.“
8cf7c585fb.translation: But they also fear him, because Tabaqui is easily afflicted with rabies, much more easily than any other animal in the jungle.

8cfa2cf4ce.translation: If employers use heavy artillery in a wrongful dismissal process, it can also backfire.

8cfa480c02.text: „Die Zeit verwandelt sie in Arschlöcher, die nur darauf warten, die Waffe zu ziehen.“
8cfa480c02.translation: Time turns them into assholes who are just waiting to draw their weapon.

8cfb3ab456.text: Letzte Woche ist Tommy zum zweiten Malvon zu Hause weggelaufen.
8cfb3ab456.translation: Last week, Tommy ran away from home for the second time.

8cfce36ce5.text: „Ich vermute sehr schlichte Ursachen: daß all das Erinnerte so ganz vergangen und abgetan ist, man selber aber – toi, toi, toi! – immer noch lebt.“
8cfce36ce5.translation: "I suspect very simple causes: that all that is remembered is so completely past and done with, but oneself – knock on wood! – still lives."

8cff46526e.translation: At Fiszer, Horst liked it exceptionally well: he learned how to make grids and gates, but above all, how to break locks and crack safes.

8cfff91c17.translation: Modern systems have multiple buses with different transmission rates and functions.
